title: CobbleSteam
description: A Cobblemon pack with a focus on create and building blocks.
body:
A semi-tuned modpack featuring Cobblemon and Create as the main focus.

Plenty of addon mods / resourcepacks / datapacks have been added to enhance both the mods with more content.

As well as lots of furniture and building block mods, with some quality of life mods to make life easier and prettier.
